parameters.name: twitch-chat2-client-secret
parameters.description: Client Secret for the separate TunaStreetTestBot Twitch app (WatchlistChatJoinerProcessor only).

parameters.name: twitch-watchlist-bot-refresh-token
parameters.description: Independent user OAuth refresh token for WatchlistChatJoinerProcessor - NOT shared with twitch-bot-refresh-token (the IRC listener uses that one and rotates it on every use).
